summary: Frontend testing completed for 'Assigned To' filter feature on Lead Management page. All test cases PASSED. The filter dropdown appears correctly, shows non-admin users, filters leads when a user is selected, resets properly with Clear Filters, and works correctly in combination with Status and Search filters.

leads_page_navigation.details: Successfully navigated to Leads page from Dashboard

assigned_to_filter_visibility.details: 'Assigned To' label and dropdown visible in filters section

filter_grid_layout.details: 5-column grid layout confirmed (Search, Status, Assigned To, Clear Filters)

dropdown_options.details: Dropdown shows 'All' option plus 12 non-admin users with their roles (e.g., 'Final Test User (agent)')

single_user_filter.details: Selecting 'nicolo zennaro' filtered leads from 912 to 4 (only leads assigned to that user)

clear_filters.details: Clear Filters button resets 'Assigned To' to 'All' and shows all 912 leads

combined_filters_status_assigned.details: Status='Callback' + Assigned To='nicolo zennaro' correctly filtered to 3 leads

combined_filters_all_three.details: Status='Callback' + Assigned To='nicolo zennaro' + Search='mario' correctly filtered to 1 lead

critical_code_review_comments: The 'Assigned To' filter implementation is correct and follows the existing filter pattern
Backend already supports filtering by assigned_to with comma-separated IDs for multiple users
Frontend currently uses single-select (not true multi-select) which is appropriate for the current use case
context_for_next_testing_agent: Assigned To filter feature is fully functional. The filter is located in the Lead Management page filters section as the 3rd filter (after Search and Status). It shows all non-admin users and correctly filters leads when a user is selected. Works well with other filters (Status, Search) combined.

functionality_verified: Filter dropdown appears in filters section
Lists all non-admin users with their roles
Single user selection filters leads correctly
Works with all three filters combined
